creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
Oh bother, just noticed that diff is against an out of date checkout.

Updated version:


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /draco/cvs/ports/devel/bazaar-ng/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.63
diff -u -r1.63 Makefile
--- Makefile	24 Jan 2011 10:07:23 -0000	1.63
+++ Makefile	4 Feb 2011 09:14:39 -0000
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	bazaar-ng
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpadlibrarian.net/62541600/
+MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpadlibrarian.net/63496203/
 DISTNAME=	bzr-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	fullermd@over-yonder.net

retrieving revision 1.55

+++ distinfo	4 Feb 2011 09:14:45 -0000
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (bzr-2.2.3.tar.gz) = 6921708
+SHA256 (bzr-2.3.0.tar.gz) = 579c21e0d29e6bac80e53bef9f220cae7675407208c5ca967302f31370d0faee
+SIZE (bzr-2.3.0.tar.gz) = 7025246
Index: pkg-descr
===================================================================
RCS file: /draco/cvs/ports/devel/bazaar-ng/pkg-descr,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -r1.2 pkg-descr
--- pkg-descr	21 Aug 2006 09:10:50 -0000	1.2
+++ pkg-descr	3 Feb 2011 23:23:40 -0000
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
-Bazaar-NG is a distributed version control system from Canonical.
-Bazaar-NG allows you to keep old versions of files and directories (usually
-source code), keep a log of who, when, and why changes occurred, etc., like SVN,
-CVS, or RCS. Bazaar-NG is distributed, which gives it significant advantages and
-some disadvantages compared to SVN and CVS. The bzr implementation is the next
-Bazaar version from Canonical called Bazaar-NG.
+Bazaar (bzr) is a decentralized revision control system, designed to be
+easy for developers and end users alike.  Bazaar is part of the GNU
+project to develop a complete free operating systemand a project of
+Canonical.  Bazaar directly supports both central version control (like
+cvs/svn) and distributed version control (like git/hg).
 
-WWW: http://bazaar-vcs.org/
+WWW: http://bazaar.canonical.com/
